elements.name: [AUT-001] Create valid user with all required fields (happy_path)

steps.name: Setup for business rule: Create valid user with all required fields
POST /api/admin/create-employee executed
Returns a successful response and enforces: User roles are: EMPLOYER, TEAM_LEADER, ADMINISTRATION
Setup for business rule: Fetch existing user by ID
GET /api/users/{id} executed
Returns a successful response and enforces: User roles are: EMPLOYER, TEAM_LEADER, ADMINISTRATION

Returns a successful response and enforces: User roles are: EMPLOYER, TEAM_LEADER, ADMINISTRATION
Setup for business rule: List all users in department
GET /api/admin/departments/{id} executed
Returns a successful response and enforces: User roles are: EMPLOYER, TEAM_LEADER, ADMINISTRATION
Setup for business rule: Assign user to valid department
PUT /api/admin/departments/{id} executed
Returns a successful response and enforces: User roles are: EMPLOYER, TEAM_LEADER, ADMINISTRATION

elements.name: [LEA-001] Create valid leave request with future dates (happy_path)

steps.name: Setup for business rule: Create valid leave request with future dates
POST /api/leave-requests/create executed
Returns a successful response and enforces: Leave dates must be in the future (cannot be past dates)
Setup for business rule: Retrieve created leave request
GET /api/leave-requests/search executed
Returns a successful response and enforces: Leave dates must be in the future (cannot be past dates)

PUT /api/leave-requests/{id}/approve executed
Returns a successful response and enforces: Leave dates must be in the future (cannot be past dates)

steps.name: Setup for business rule: Reject pending leave request as Employer
PUT /api/leave-requests/{id}/reject executed

User authenticates with conge service → Gets JWT token -> User creates leave request in DemandeConge with token
DemandeConge calls conge to verify user role -> Team leader receives notification of pending leave -> Team leader approves leave
User receives approval notification
User creates leave from 2026-05-01 to 2026-05- -> User tries to create overlapping leave 2026-05-05 to 2026-05-
Services exchange data to complete the workflow
System rejects second request
User (Employee) creates leave request -> Team Leader with different role tries to approve
System verifies Team Leader role from conge -> Team Leader successfully approves
Employer verifies approval in audit log

elements.name: [E2E-004] Integration rule: Verify user exists in conge service before creating leave (integration)

steps.name: A cross-service workflow is in progress
One service validates or enriches data by calling another service
Verify user exists in conge service before creating leave
